latestComments.text:
Very disappointed with my experience with Ounass.

I returned a shirt less than 30 minutes after receiving it because I simply didn’t like it and felt it was overpriced for the quality. Shortly after, I received a call claiming the shirt was “damaged.”

When the item was sent back to me, there was absolutely no visible damage. I took clear photos and videos immediately after receiving it back and sent everything to their team. Their response was simply: “This is the decision.”

I honestly do not understand on what basis a high-quality shirt in perfect condition is being refused for return without any proof, explanation, or transparency.

This is extremely disappointing customer service, especially from a luxury platform. I will be escalating this matter to Consumer Protection because customers deserve fairness and proper explanations, not vague decisions.

caption:
Light Play: Brilliant cuts and unexpected settings define diamond jewellery from Suzanne Kalan, creating modern heirlooms with a distinctive edge.
تراقص الأضواء: تُبدع سوازان كالان بأسلوب ترصيع الماس الذي يفوق التوقعات، لتقدّم مجوهرات عصرية بلمسة مميّزة.

Designed in collaboration with Berlin-based architecture studio VAUST, led by Joern von Scheipers and David Kosock, the space reflects the Ounass identity through a refined brutalist lens - balancing sculptural forms, raw textures, and a modular design that can be continuously tailored and reimagined with every new experience.

"The project combines brutalist materiality with a more refined and contemporary spatial atmosphere. It references the rawness of Berlin as a city and industrial spaces while responding to the precision and intensity of Dubai." 
- Joern von Scheipers and David Kosock

صُمّمَ هذا المكان بالتعاون مع استوديو الهندسة المعمارية " فاوست "، الذي يتّخذ من برلين مقرًّا له، بقيادة يورن فون شايبرز ودافيد كوسوك، ليعكس هُويّة أُناس في أسلوب العمارة البروتاليست، بين الأشكال النحتية، الملمس الخام والتصميم المعياري والإبداعي الذي يمكن تكييفه وإعادة تصوّره مع كلّ تجربة جديدة.

"يجمع أُناس ستيج بين الطابع المادي للطراز البروتاليستي لكن مع توجّهٍ نحو العصرية والرقيّ أكثر.  أخذ الطابع الخام لمدينة برلين وللمساحات الصناعية ليتماشى مع الدقة والحيوية التي تتميّز بها دبي."
- يورن فون شايبرز ودافيد كوسوك
